name: StatusBar
summary: Contains static methods to control the application status bar.

methods.name: ClearMessagePane
methods.summary: Removes the message from the message pane.

methods.name: HideProgressMeter()
methods.summary: Ends, or hides, Rhino's status bar progress meter.

methods.name: HideProgressMeter(UInt32)
methods.summary: Ends, or hides, Rhino's status bar progress meter.

params.name: docSerialNumber
params.doc: The document runtime serial number.

methods.name: SetDistancePane
methods.summary: Sets the distance pane to a distance value.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The distance value.

methods.name: SetMessagePane
methods.summary: Sets the message pane to a message.

params.name: message
params.doc: The message value.

methods.name: SetNumberPane
methods.summary: Sets the number pane to a number value

params.name: number
params.doc: [Missing <param name="number"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.UI.StatusBar.SetNumberPane(System.Double)"]

methods.name: SetPointPane
methods.summary: Sets the point pane to a point value.

params.name: point
params.doc: The point value.

methods.name: ShowProgressMeter(Int32, Int32, String, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static int ShowProgressMeter(int lowerLimit, int upperLimit, string label, bool embedLabel, bool showPercentComplete)
methods.summary: Starts, or shows, Rhino's status bar progress meter.

params.name: lowerLimit
params.doc: The lower limit of the progress meter's range.

params.name: upperLimit
params.doc: The upper limit of the progress meter's range.

params.name: label
params.doc: The short description of the progress (e.g. "Calculating", "Meshing", etc)

params.name: embedLabel
params.doc: If true, then the label will be embedded in the progress meter. If false, then the label will appear to the left of the progress meter.

params.name: showPercentComplete
params.doc: If true, then the percent complete will appear in the progress meter.

returns.doc: 1 - The progress meter was created successfully. 0 - The progress meter was not created. -1 - The progress meter was not created because some other process has already created it.

methods.name: ShowProgressMeter(UInt32, Int32, Int32, String, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static int ShowProgressMeter(uint docSerialNumber, int lowerLimit, int upperLimit, string label, bool embedLabel, bool showPercentComplete)
methods.summary: Starts, or shows, Rhino's status bar progress meter.

params.name: docSerialNumber
params.doc: The document runtime serial number.

params.name: lowerLimit
params.doc: The lower limit of the progress meter's range.

params.name: upperLimit
params.doc: The upper limit of the progress meter's range.

params.name: label
params.doc: The short description of the progress (e.g. "Calculating", "Meshing", etc)

params.name: embedLabel
params.doc: If true, then the label will be embedded in the progress meter. If false, then the label will appear to the left of the progress meter.

params.name: showPercentComplete
params.doc: If true, then the percent complete will appear in the progress meter.

returns.doc: 1 - The progress meter was created successfully. 0 - The progress meter was not created. -1 - The progress meter was not created because some other process has already created it.

methods.name: UpdateProgressMeter(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static int UpdateProgressMeter(int position, bool absolute)
methods.summary: Sets the current position of Rhino's status bar progress meter.

params.name: position
params.doc: The new value. This can be stated in absolute terms, or relative compared to the current position. The interval bounds are specified when you first show the bar.

params.name: absolute
params.doc: If true, then the progress meter is moved to position. If false, then the progress meter is moved position from the current position (relative).

methods.name: UpdateProgressMeter(UInt32, Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static int UpdateProgressMeter(uint docSerialNumber, int position, bool absolute)
methods.summary: Sets the current position of Rhino's status bar progress meter.

params.name: docSerialNumber
params.doc: The document runtime serial number.

params.name: position
params.doc: The new value. This can be stated in absolute terms, or relative compared to the current position. The interval bounds are specified when you first show the bar.

params.name: absolute
params.doc: If true, then the progress meter is moved to position. If false, then the progress meter is moved position from the current position (relative).
